allow: Bash(node -e "const id = require\(''./src/messages/id.json''\); const en = require\(''./src/messages/en.json''\); const idKeys = Object.keys\(id.plpage\); const enKeys = Object.keys\(en.plpage\); const onlyInId = idKeys.filter\(k => !enKeys.includes\(k\)\); const onlyInEn = enKeys.filter\(k => !idKeys.includes\(k\)\); console.log\(''ID keys:'', idKeys.length\); console.log\(''EN keys:'', enKeys.length\); console.log\(''Only in ID:'', onlyInId\); console.log\(''Only in EN:'', onlyInEn\);")

Bash(node -e "const id = require\(''./src/messages/id.json''\); const en = require\(''./src/messages/en.json''\); const idKeys = Object.keys\(id.plpage\); const enKeys = Object.keys\(en.plpage\); const onlyInId = idKeys.filter\(k => enKeys.indexOf\(k\) === -1\); const onlyInEn = enKeys.filter\(k => idKeys.indexOf\(k\) === -1\); console.log\(''ID keys:'', idKeys.length\); console.log\(''EN keys:'', enKeys.length\); console.log\(''Only in ID:'', JSON.stringify\(onlyInId\)\); console.log\(''Only in EN:'', JSON.stringify\(onlyInEn\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''src/messages/en.json'',''utf8''\)\); const keys=Object.keys\(j.plpage\); console.log\(keys.join\(''\\n''\)\);")
